_comment: PRD-006 package delivery — recipient guard + Hold ops alert. Insert on the spec_sheet.sent/channel=package branch BEFORE 'Fetch package PDF'. TRUE output (safe recipient) → connect to 'Fetch package PDF' (see package-delivery-email.node.json). FALSE output (weak/internal recipient) → 'Hold — notify ops', which does NOT send to the customer; it alerts ops so the package can be handled manually. Fields read from the 'Verify signature' node (envelope body).

parameters.subject: =[HELD] Package NOT sent — {{ $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.quote_number }} ({{ $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.client_name }})
